description: Use this API to modify one data point to harmonics current source table in the working case. This API is used to change H, I/I0, and Angle data of existing harmonic number (HPTOLD) in the existing working case harmonics data table. This API cannot be used to change table name. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_cursrc_chng_onept(name, hptold, hpt, ipt, anpt)
python_syntax: ierr = har_cursrc_chng_onept(name, hptold, hpt, ipt, anpt)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Harmonics current source data table name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: hptold
parameters.description: Harmonics number at point in data table where provided data is changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: hpt
parameters.description: New harmonics number to be changed. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: ipt
parameters.description: Current source magnitude for harmonics number hpt to be changed. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: anpt
parameters.description: Current source angle for harmonics number hpt to be changed. (input; 1 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
